name: Okra in a Savoury Sauce
recipeIngredient: 10 Pieces of Okra, cut into 3/4-inch disks
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add onion and sauté until golden brown, about 10 to 12 minutes.
2. Stir in garlic, ginger, chili, turmeric, and almond. Cook for 1 minute.
3. Add chopped tomato and cook for another minute.
4. Add okra pieces and stir well to combine.
5. Cover the skillet and simmer on low heat for 6 to 7 minutes.
6. Stir in salt.
7. Just before serving, sprinkle with cilantro or parsley.
